title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Manipal Digital Health is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Manipal Digital Health invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
